description: A typed exception raised when a MatchResult falls outside any tolerance band (or the duplicate pre-check fires). Each exception carries one MatchExceptionType, is routed to a single accountable resolver (price to Buyer, quantity and missing-GR to Receiving, tax to Tax/Compliance, duplicate to Finance-Maker), and is closed by a MatchResolution (accept / adjust re-run the match; credit-note / debit-note post a note then clear; reject returns the invoice with no payable). The control that ensures every out-of-tolerance invoice is resolved by the right role, not silently accepted.

fields.name: identifier
fields.label: Exception Ref.
fields.validation: system pattern; unique; immutable once raised
fields.purpose: Stable key for the exception so its routing, resolution and any credit/debit note trace to one case and back to its match result; the handle the resolver and an auditor act on.

fields.name: matchResultId
fields.label: Match Result
fields.validation: resolves to the MatchResult whose matchStatus = exception; not null
fields.purpose: Anchors the exception to the reconciliation that failed tolerance, so resolving it re-runs that same match (three-way/two-way) or clears it via a note; one match result can raise several typed exceptions.

fields.name: type
fields.label: Exception Type
fields.validation: one of {price-variance, qty-over, qty-under, missing-GR, duplicate-invoice, tax-mismatch}; determines the resolver
fields.purpose: Classifies which check failed; the type selects the accountable resolver and the expected resolution (a duplicate is held with no payable, a missing-GR is fixed by raising the GRN), making the routing deterministic.

fields.name: routedTo
fields.label: Routed To
fields.validation: derived from type: price-variance -> Buyer; qty-over/qty-under/missing-GR -> Receiving; tax-mismatch -> TaxCompliance; duplicate-invoice -> FinanceMaker
fields.purpose: Names the single accountable resolver role the exception is routed to, derived from the type; each exception type maps to exactly one resolver so accountability is unambiguous.

fields.name: variance
fields.label: Variance
fields.validation: the out-of-tolerance amount/percentage detail for the type (price %, qty delta, amount variance tax-inclusive)
fields.purpose: Quantifies how far out of tolerance the failed check was, so the resolver sees the size of the discrepancy and can choose accept, adjust, credit-note, debit-note or reject appropriately.

fields.name: resolution
fields.label: Resolution
fields.mandatoryCondition: mandatory when the resolver acts on the exception
fields.validation: one of {accept, adjust, credit-note, debit-note, reject}; accept/adjust re-run the match; credit-note/debit-note post a note then clear; reject returns the invoice (no payable). Duplicate hold: reject (confirmed) or accept (false positive, re-route to match)
fields.purpose: The resolver's decision that closes the exception: accept/adjust re-enter matching, credit-note/debit-note adjust the payable via a note (the same mechanism a return uses) then clear, reject returns the invoice with no payable (axiom A8).

fields.name: resolvedBy
fields.label: Resolved By
fields.mandatoryCondition: set when a resolution is recorded
fields.validation: a user in the routedTo role; from authenticated profile
fields.purpose: Records who resolved the exception for accountability and the audit trail; the resolver must belong to the role the exception was routed to.

fields.name: resolutionNote
fields.label: Resolution Note
fields.mandatoryCondition: mandatory for a duplicate false-positive override and recommended on accept/reject
fields.validation: max 2000 chars; required reason for a coincidental-duplicate override
fields.purpose: The documented reason behind the resolution, especially the mandatory reason when a Finance-Maker overrides a coincidental duplicate signature to proceed; the human-readable record an auditor reads for the decision.

fields.name: linkedNoteId
fields.label: Credit / Debit Note
fields.mandatoryCondition: set when resolution is credit-note or debit-note
fields.validation: resolves to the note posted to adjust the payable for this exception
fields.purpose: Links the exception to the credit or debit note that adjusts the payable (linkedMatchExceptionId on the note); the adjusted net then clears GR/IR (three-way) or posts directly (two-way).

fields.name: resolvedAt
fields.label: Resolved At
fields.validation: now() when the resolution is recorded
fields.purpose: Timestamps the resolution; measures exception cycle time for the AP KPIs and anchors the audit/SSE entry for the resolution event (axiom A13).

invariants: A8 an out-of-tolerance match raises a typed exception routed to a resolver; never silently accepted
A13 audit + SSE on every exception and resolution
each exception type routes to a single accountable resolver role (price->Buyer, qty/missing-GR->Receiving, tax->Tax/Compliance, duplicate->Finance-Maker)
a confirmed duplicate never posts a payable; a coincidental duplicate is overridden with a mandatory reason
accept/adjust re-run the match; credit-note/debit-note adjust via a note then clear; reject yields no payable
